step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows a ZONNIC nicotine pouch product with the logo prominently centered. The C in the logo has a mint green and light blue gradient halo behind it, matching the mint flavour theme. The background is a soft minty gradient with floating mint leaves, and regulatory warnings are clearly displayed at the top and bottom.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows a ZONNIC nicotine pouch product with the logo prominently centered. The C in the logo has a mint green and light blue gradient halo behind it, matching the mint flavour theme. The background is a soft minty gradient with floating mint leaves, and regulatory warnings are clearly displayed at the top and bottom.
CONTENT TYPE: flavour_led

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: large, occupies most of the central area

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: gradient, blending mint green and light blue
  Halo is gradient (two colours): YES
  Gradient colours: mint green (#b7da9b) and light blue (#75bee9)
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: gradient
  Colours: mint green, light blue, white
  Gradient direction: top left to bottom right
  Description: Soft minty/icy gradient with floating mint leaves

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: PRESENT
    Position: top and on product label
    Text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking. AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
    Bilingual: YES
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: PRESENT
    Position: bottom of image

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold sans-serif for logo, regular sans-serif for all other text
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: 24 Nicotine Pouches / Sachets de nicotine, MINT / MENTHE, Nicotine Replacement Therapy / Thérapie de remplacement, 4 MG

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, mint green, light blue, white
  Flavour palette match: Green/Mint and Blue
  Secondary colour usage: used as accent in halo and background gradient

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image features the ZONNIC logo in bold navy blue letters, centered on a mint nicotine pouch product. The C in the logo has a circular halo with a mint green and light blue gradient, matching the mint flavour palette. The background is a soft minty gradient with floating mint leaves, visually supporting the flavour-led theme. Regulatory warnings are clearly displayed at the top and bottom, and all text uses a clean sans-serif font. However, the 18+ age restriction icon is missing from the image, which is a critical regulatory requirement for all marketing assets. All other brand elements, including logo integrity, halo placement, colour palette, and gradient direction, are correctly applied. To achieve full compliance, the 18+ icon must be added at the bottom of the image.
